item.title: ‘Sun Children’ shortlisted for 2021 Oscars
item.description: ‘Sun Children’ has been shortlisted for 2021 Oscars. The movie had its Iranian premiere during the 38th Fajr Film Festival in Tehran last February, garnering the Crystal Simorghs for best film, scrip…

item.title: Careers: Maya Generalist
item.description: We are hiring Maya Generalists Please send us your resume at: careers@alzahravfx.com

item.title: Careers: Storyboard Artist
item.description: We are hiring Storyboard Artists: Please send us your resume at: careers@alzahravfx.com

item.title: Alzahra Talents: Mohammad Afshanifarid

item.title: Fajr Festival Nominations Announced
item.description: The final nominees for The Best Visual Effects for the 39th Fajr Film Festival have just been announced and Alzahra Studio has received this nomination for “Without Everything” by Mohsen Gharaei. We …

item.description: Below is just about everything you’ll need to style in the theme. Check the source code to see the many embedded elements within paragraphs. Heading 1 Heading 2 Heading 3 Heading 4 Heading 5 Heading …

item.title: Women Are Incredible
item.description: After the legalisation of polygamy in Iran, things come to a head for Ardalan when he is involved in an unfortunate car accident. Injured in the crash, the secret of Ardalan's multiple marriages is s…

item.title: The Sinners
item.description: The story is about a girl who got murdered suspiciously. In her life she knew many people but each person has his own perspectives about her.

item.title: Trapped
item.description: Darband (trapped), directed by Parviz Shahbazi. After our good experience in Zanha Shegefangizand, this time we made a realistic CGI car accident once again.

item.title: Death of the Fish
item.description: An old woman's death brings her children together so maybe family's wounds will be healed during this unwanted confrontation.

item.title: All Alone: The Messenger of Peace
item.description: The story of a boy who goes to UN to deliver the message of friendship and peace of Iranians to the world and defend their rights. This happens when a boy from a village around the nuclear plan of Bu…

item.title: I Am Diego Maradona
item.description: A writer who stole his friend's work is forced to write another sad novel on his behalf while in the middle of a family fight.

item.title: The Salesman
item.description: Alzahravfx will help you to see a movie within all its special features and that’s why it is so important among all. There are so many people who are working on this plots for days and nights to make…

item.title: Giti's Problem
item.description: It's about a couple Iraj and Giti who their life is about to collapse. Their problem is Giti's virtual life in the internet and the doubts and consequences of that which affect their life.

item.title: Sperm Whale
item.description: It's a sequel to the first Sperm Whale. This movie is set at Arzhang (Reza Attaran) 's wedding day. It includes lots of flashbacks to the time of of friendship of him with the bride, Roya (Mahnaz Afs…

item.title: Spyder

item.title: Hot Scent
item.description: Hot Scent is a tale of generational gap, a contrast evident in 20 year old Maryam's attitudes and her strict parents'. Returning home past the curfew after spending time with her boyfriend, she is fo…

item.title: The Dark Room
item.description: The Dark Room

item.title: The Lost Strait
item.description: The resistance of Ammar battalion in Abughoraib strait at the last days of Iran-Iraq war.
